response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong full-stack and systems development experience with a focus on scalable, testable solutions and cross-functional collaboration. While her background includes AI-agent infrastructure and experimentation-adjacent work (e.g., pricing optimization, telemetry), her expertise in large-scale experimentation platforms and distributed systems is less explicitly proven compared to the role's requirements. Her leadership in open-source projects and technical mentorship aligns well with the Principal-level expectations.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in designing and shipping scalable systems across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, and cloud).
Proven technical leadership in architecture, tooling, and cross-team collaboration (e.g., GISCollective, MCP code generators).
Strong hands-on coding skills in relevant languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C/C++) and modern engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of building or leading enterprise-scale experimentation platforms (e.g., A/B testing frameworks, rollout automation).
Most roles emphasize full-stack development or tooling rather than dedicated growth/experimentation systems engineering.
Preferred qualifications like multi-region distributed systems and AI-driven engineering velocity are not clearly highlighted.
